sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96663" key="stefanostau/rion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στεφᾰνοσταύριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n96663.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cross in a wreath, Palestine Exploration Fund Quarterly Statement</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1931.67</biblScope> </bibl> (Beth Shan).</sense> </entryFree>
